Tool 02 of 05

What Is Each Booked Job
Actually Costing You?

Most companies track leads. Very few know what it costs to book a real job. Enter your numbers and see your true cost per booked job - benchmarked against the top 25% in your trade.

Your Marketing Numbers Based on HVAC, roofing & plumbing benchmarks
Trade / Industry
Monthly marketing spend ads + agency fees combined
$
Inbound calls / leads per month all sources combined
Close rate % of calls that book a job
%
Industry average:28–35% · Top 25%: 50%+
Average job ticket average revenue per booked job
$
Marketing Diagnostic Waiting for your numbers
📊

Most companies underestimate this by 30–60%.

They count cost-per-lead from the platform dashboard. But platform leads ≠ booked jobs. Your real cost is spend ÷ jobs booked - not spend ÷ leads received.

Your true cost per booked job
